title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast from New York Tech Week discusses how software engineering is evolving in the AI era, the trend of companies exhausting annual AI budgets quickly due to tokenmaxxing, NVIDIA's new RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal PCs, and universities' challenges adapting AI literacy curricula as students enter workplaces transformed by AI.
